---
title: "SQL Is Not Easy..."
author: "Nicole Hua"
date: "2026-03-02"
categories: [code]
---


While I prepare for my final assignment, I am expanding my coding capabilties and learning how to handle data. I found this assignment difficult because there was a lot of data and I found it difficult to "append" it to my table...? (I think that's what I did).

My assignment is very long because of how many participants there are... I hope the HTML works for you. 

Press [here](handlingdatahw.html) to see my assignment.
